'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 70''' is the seventieth issue of the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[June 27]], [[1979]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 30|''Star Wars'' (1977) 30]]
*"The power of Warlock Part 3: At the mercy of the Star-Thief!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 1: Earth shall overcome!"
